scripts.preinstall: sh -c 'rm -f package-lock.json yarn.lock; case "$npm_config_user_agent" in pnpm/*) ;; *) echo "Use pnpm instead" >&2; exit 1 ;; esac'
scripts.build:all: pnpm run build:mobile && pnpm run build:api && pnpm run build:sandbox
scripts.build:mobile: pnpm --filter @workspace/mobile run typecheck && pnpm --filter @workspace/mobile run build
scripts.build:api: pnpm --filter @workspace/api-server run typecheck && pnpm --filter @workspace/api-server run build
scripts.build:sandbox: pnpm --filter @workspace/mockup-sandbox run typecheck && pnpm --filter @workspace/mockup-sandbox run build
scripts.typecheck: pnpm run typecheck:libs && pnpm -r --filter "./artifacts/**" --filter "./scripts" --if-present run typecheck
